message:
feat: Extend CLI with robot mode and structured exit codes

Add agent-friendly operation modes:

- Introduce dedicated exit codes module for machine-readable status
- Extend CLI with robot mode for JSON output
- Improve lib interface for programmatic usage
- Enhance main entry point with expanded options

Robot mode enables AI agents to safely interact with dcg
by providing structured responses instead of human-oriented text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
